paper_title: Applying AHP method and GIS to evaluate land suitability for paddy rice crop in Quang Xuong district, Thanh Hoa province

entities.id: Land suitability evaluation for paddy rice
entities.description: The assessment of land capacity and restrictions for rice production in Quang Xuong district.
The practice of managing land resources to satisfy socio-economic needs while protecting the ecological environment.
A multi-criteria decision-making tool used to derive weightings for various criteria through pairwise comparison.
A system used to integrate, store, and analyze spatial information for land suitability mapping.
Software used for processing spatial data and overlaying thematic layers to generate suitability maps.
Framework used for collecting and evaluating land data, modified for Vietnamese conditions.
Method used to aggregate a comparison matrix of experts' judgments.
Spatial data reflecting the soil characteristics of Thanh Hoa province.
Spatial database of existing land use patterns in the study area.
Percentage of examined area classified as moderately suitable for rice production.
Percentage of examined area classified as marginally suitable for rice production.
Percentage of examined area classified as currently unsuitable for rice production.
Percentage of examined area classified as permanently unsuitable for rice production.
Measurement of variation allowed in pairwise comparison matrices to ensure consistency.
The field of assessing and planning land resources for agricultural optimization.
Lead author of the study.

Faculty of Agriculture Forestry and Fishery, Vietnam.
Faculty of Land Management, Vietnam.
